title: Integrations Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the integrations family — declarative integration configuration including Procore (read-only operational data), Sage Intacct (accounting book of record), and other allowed external systems. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). Procore Object Link Records and Procore Curated Summary Records remain placeholder / future-reference only and do not become full Procore canonical models in Phase 1. SPFx must not call Procore directly — all Procore traffic routes through `backend/functions/`. Procore write-back remains deferred from MVP. No secrets are stored in this family or any related schema; `ProcoreCompanyId = 5280` is configuration. Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §11, §13, §14, §22.
